channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: UAE president says prepared to confront ‘threats’ as Iran attacks continue
item.description: Iran's judiciary chief contradicts earlier apology to Gulf, warns of ‘heavy attacks’ on areas ‘at disposal of enemy'.

item.title: Russia kills 10 in Ukraine strike including children with new missile
item.description: President Zelenskyy calls for international response as Russian assault targets civilian and energy infrastructure.

item.title: ‘They’re cancer’: Trump threatens cartels, Cuba at Latin American summit
item.description: The president offered to launch missiles in Latin America to combat criminal violence in a call to 'eradicate' cartels.

item.title: War against Iran: How far will it go?
item.description: Redi Tlhabi challenges former US Ambassador to the UN John Bolton on why he supports war and regime change in Iran.

item.title: Israel kills father, daughter in Gaza as genocide continues amid wider war
item.description: Suffering in Gaza and occupied West Bank remains acute as the world focuses on the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Iranian authorities warn against ‘fifth column’, as no signs of war abating
item.description: Intelligence Ministry renews call to report any suspicious activity through phone calls, messaging services.

item.title: Aftermath of village in Lebanon after Hezbollah, Israeli troops clash
item.description: Aftermath of village in Lebanon after Hezbollah, Israeli troops clash

item.title: Indonesians protest Iran war, pressure president over US ties
item.description: Protesters in Indonesia have rallied against the US-Israeli war on Iran, denouncing their government's ties to the US.

item.title: Kurdish fighters say Iran ground operation ‘highly likely’
item.description: Babasheikh Hosseini has told Al Jazeera it is highly likely that Kurdish fighters will stage a ground operation in Iran.

item.title: Sirens echo in occupied East Jerusalem warning of Iranian missiles
item.description: Air raid sirens blared across occupied East Jerusalem on Saturday after missiles were reportedly fired by Iran.
